narrative.headline: Engine complaints dominate the 2018 Ford Edge
narrative.summary: Engine-related complaints dominate owner reports for this model, with the most common symptom being headlights that owners describe as too dim to illuminate road markings in wet or ambient-lit conditions. Engine and engine cooling issues are the second most reported area, followed by powertrain and brake concerns. Together these four areas account for nearly all complaints filed with NHTSA.

issues.sample: THE LOW BEAM HEADLIGHTS ARE SO WEAK THAT WHEN THE ROAD IS WET AT NIGHT OR WHEN DRIVING NEAR AMBIENT LIGHTING SUCH AS STREET LIGHTS YOU CAN'T SEE ANY MARKINGS ON THE ROAD SUCH AS THE CENTERLINE OF THE ROAD.    THERE IS ALSO EXHAUST FUMES COMING INTO THE CAR WHEN DRIVING WITH THE W
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report that low-beam headlights are too weak to illuminate road markings such as centerlines when driving on wet roads or near ambient lighting like street lights. · 1 fire · 1 crash

issues.title: Engine And Engine Cooling
issues.blurb: Owners report recurring cylinder misfire error codes and express concern that coolant may be leaking into the engine block, which they associate with the risk of total engine failure.

issues.sample: LOSS OF TRANSMISSION POWER, LIKE AS IF THE TRANSMISSION CANT DECIDE WHICH GEAR TO BE IN, THEN WHEN IT SELECTS THE GEAR IT SLAMS INTO GEAR SO HARD THAT IT FEELS LIKE YOU HAVE BEEN HIT FROM BEHIND BY A TRUCK. THIS HAS HAPPENED WHILE DRIVING IN STOP AND GO TRAFFIC, WHEN DRIVING THRU
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the transmission hesitates between gears and then slams into gear with a sudden jolt described as feeling like a rear-end collision. · 2 crash · 4 injured

issues.sample: BRAKES ARE TOO SENSITIVE (GRABBING) AT LOW SPEED, ESPECIALLY AFTER SITTING OVERNIGHT.  A VERY SLIGHT TOUCH OF THE BRAKE PEDAL WILL CAUSE THE CAR TO IMMEDIATELY STOP AND ANYONE IN THE CAR WILL SLIDE FORWARD IN THEIR SEAT IF NOT OUT OF THE SEAT.  THIS IS A PROBLEM WITH BOTH MYSELF
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report that the brakes feel overly sensitive and grab abruptly at low speeds, particularly after the vehicle has been sitting overnight, causing occupants to lurch forward from minimal pedal pressure. · 3 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 33 reports (4% of complaints), including 1 fire, 1 crash, and 1 injury. Verify the lights and electronics all work as expected.
